lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

USSL.USS_FSL.DistanceToObject.comment: [0 .. 5m] by steps of 10 cm, 6,3m (3Fh) : No measure performed

USSL.USS_RSL.DistanceToObject.comment: [0 .. 5m] by steps of 10 cm, 6,3m (3Fh) : No measure performed

USSR.USS_FSR.DistanceToObject.comment: [0 .. 5m] by steps of 10 cm, 6,3m (3Fh) : No measure performed

USSR.USS_RSR.DistanceToObject.comment: [0 .. 5m] by steps of 10 cm, 6,3m (3Fh) : No measure performed

Sensors_Control_Full_Mode.comment: with distance mesurement, faults are monitored, blocked sensor detection

Sensors_Control_Light_Mode.comment: without distance mesurement, faults are monitored, no blocked sensor detection

Cfg.BSW_WarningLevel2_LED_Flashing_Rate.comment: Warning LED Flashing Rate on Alert Level 2,range 0 to 15(0.5 to 7.5Hz)

BSW_Switch_LED_day_brightness.comment: Day Brithness of BSW switch LED,min:0 max:100 (1TO10)

BSW_Switch_LED_night_brightness.comment: Night Brithness of BSW switch LED,min:0 max:100

BSW_Warning_LED_day_brightness.comment: Day Brithness of BSW Warning LEDs (Right and Left),min:0 max:100

BSW_Warning_LED_night_brightness.comment: Night Brithness of BSW Warning LEDs (Right and Left),min:0 max:100

BSW_SystemStatus.comment: To read the BSW system state

BSW_LeftLEDCommand.comment: switches on the left warning  LED

BSW_RightLEDCommand.comment: switches on the right warning  LED

BSW_InitialStateCfg.comment: Configures the Inital state of BSW (On / Off / Userdefined), userdefined is the default value

BSW_SwitchLEDCommand.comment: switches on the BSW switch LED

BSW_SVA_2ndLevelWarningSound.comment: only 1 bit has value, others fixed to 0

VehicleSpeed.comment: Copy of the vehicle read on CAN

BSW_StateMachine.all.comment: 0:state inactive;1:state active. bits can be set to '1' at the same time in case of sub-states

Cfg.SupplierData.comment: Data reserved for supplier use, as "black box" configuration data
